drive_dates: ● September 24, 2025 : PPT and Test ● September 25, 2025 : Interviews ● September 26, 2025 : Interviews (if required)
date_of_joining: October 6, 2025 (leaves will be provided for examination on day of exam only).

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 9 month training : Rs 20,000/- per month ( subject to the standard deduction of PF, ESI ) Salary after 9 month training (on confirmation) : between CTC 5 LPA - 7 LPA Note: The department and CTC for which a candidate is hired, will purely depend on the factors like a Test score, Interview evaluation, skills, and experience.
package_salary.bond: Candidates will be required to sign an agreement for 24 months, and those who intend to leave the organization before shall pay liquidated damages of Rs 2 Lakh (INR).
